sn56.123-125:0.3: Dying as Animals and Reborn as Gods
sn56.123-125:1.1: … "So too, bhikkhus, those beings are few who, when they pass away from the animal realm, are reborn among the devas. But those beings are more numerous who, when they pass away from the animal realm, are reborn in hell … in the animal realm … in the domain of ghosts. … "
